---
title: "test_warden_burnin.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/unit/test_warden_burnin.py"
loc: 34
complexity: 4
logic_score: 5.85
style_score: 3.70
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 4.27
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating test_burn_in.

## Interaction Protocol
Import test_burn_in and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.engine.atomic_gpt](file://src.core.engine.atomic_gpt)

### Exports
- `test_burn_in`
